name: cv-app
description: Progressively clarify, evidence, and project professional identity without forcing one-shot CV generation.

interface.shortDescription: Progressive professional identity and CV alignment
interface.longDescription: Work iteratively with one professional-identity uncertainty at a time, distinguish evidence from interpretation, compare defensible framings, and close with a reviewed proposal or retained unknowns.
defaultPrompt: Use CV App to help me clarify one part of my professional identity without rewriting my whole CV yet.
Use grind-with-doc to examine this experience and determine which claims are supported, limited, or still unknown.
Help me compare two possible professional framings and close with a reviewable proposal.
